Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag for JDK 21 and specify the plugin version.
Refactor the root pom.xml to act as a parent aggregator for multiple modules instead of a standalone application.
Move dependency declarations from direct dependencies to dependencyManagement to enforce version consistency across modules.
Move plugin configurations from direct plugins to pluginManagement to allow child modules to inherit settings.
Update Spring Boot starter parent version to 3.5.7.
Add MyBatis Spring Boot starter dependency management.
Add Lombok dependency management with provided scope.
Add PageHelper Spring Boot starter dependency management.
Add Knife4j OpenAPI 3 Jakarta starter dependency management for API documentation.
Add AspectJ runtime and weaver dependencies for AOP support.
Add JJWT dependencies for JWT token handling.
Add Alibaba Cloud OSS SDK dependency for object storage.
Add Jakarta XML Bind API and implementation dependencies, likely required for JAXB usage in newer Java versions.
Add Fastjson dependency for JSON processing.
Add Apache Commons Lang dependency for utility classes.
Add Alibaba Druid Spring Boot starter dependency for database connection pooling.

Frontend-Home/index.html.general_idea: Replace the custom static HTML/CSS/JS homepage with a standard Vue 3 project entry point to support the frontend migration to Vue.
